rationale: Elec. Code §255.001 governs disclosure on political advertising. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A person may not knowingly cause to be published, distributed, or broadcast political advertising containing express advocacy that does not indicate in the advertising:
_note: The cited election code provision is unrelated to the proposed tax code change; no overlap in subject matter.
